final:
module divider (
    input [3:0] dividend_inverted,
    input [3:0] divisor,
    output reg [3:0] quotient,
    output reg [3:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor != 0) begin
            quotient = dividend_inverted / divisor;
            remainder = dividend_inverted % divisor;
        end else begin
            quotient = 4'b0000; // Division by zero case
            remainder = 4'b0000; // Division by zero case
        end
    end
endmodule
